issueContext.title: feature: Auto-flag roadmap items linked to upstream NOT_PLANNED issues
issueContext.body: The cookbook roadmap held 3 items in in-progress status for 3+ days while their linked upstream library issues had already been closed as NOT_PLANNED by the babysitter maintainers. Extend the roadmap render / sync step to inspect roadmap items with issue_link fields or similar, query gh issue view <link> --json state,stateReason with a fallback to state,closedAt for older gh versions, and if state is CLOSED and stateReason is NOT_PLANNED surface a consider dropping warning in rendered HTML or emit a non-blocking lint message in CI. Auto-dropping items is out of scope; keep a human in the loop.

comments.author: a5c-ai
comments.body: Triage confirms there is no scripts/render-roadmap.mjs, no issue_link, no stateReason, and no NOT_PLANNED handling in current roadmap/docs tooling. Closest warning/reporting surface is scripts/docs-freshness-report.cjs with central scope in scripts/docs-qa-config.cjs, wired through docs:freshness, docs:qa, docs:ci, and .github/workflows/ci.yml. Recommended approach: reusable roadmap/upstream-issue stale-link check callable from docs:freshness/docs:qa; define authoritative roadmap sources and issue_link metadata format; parse linked GitHub issue references; dedupe issue lookups; query gh issue view <link> --json state,stateReason,closedAt,url,title with bounded timeouts; emit warning-only output for state CLOSED and stateReason NOT_PLANNED; do not infer NOT_PLANNED from closedAt alone when stateReason is missing; add parser and state evaluation tests without live network calls.

acceptanceCriteria: Roadmap-style docs or configured roadmap sources can expose GitHub issue links through issue_link metadata or an explicitly documented equivalent format.
Linked issue lookup is deduped and bounded, and can be tested with mocked gh/process execution.
Only CLOSED issues with stateReason NOT_PLANNED generate stale-roadmap warnings.
OPEN issues, CLOSED completed issues, gh failures, timeouts, auth/network absence, and missing stateReason do not generate false NOT_PLANNED warnings.
Warnings are included in artifacts/docs-qa/freshness-report.json and surfaced in docs:freshness output.
The warning is informational and does not fail docs:freshness, docs:qa, or CI.
No implementation automatically drops, rewrites, or changes roadmap item status.

processLibraryResearch.selectedShape: flat phase list with per-phase TDD convergence loops
processLibraryResearch.reasoning: The bug class and integration point are known from triage. The requested methodology is TDD and spec-driven with adversarial scoring, so each phase runs red, green, refactor, verification, and adversarial review until score >= 90.

implementationNotes: Prefer scripts/docs-freshness-report.cjs as the warning/reporting surface because no roadmap renderer exists in this repo.
Prefer pure helpers for parsing and state classification so tests do not require live GitHub calls.
If child_process spawning is needed, isolate it behind an injectable adapter and use short timeouts.
Treat older gh versions that cannot return stateReason as uncertain; do not infer NOT_PLANNED from closedAt alone.
Keep breakpoints sparse; only pause when the roadmap source contract or metadata format is genuinely ambiguous.
